About This Dashboard
What It Does
Regime-aware method selection across ETF momentum, pole rotation, and stock screening. Automatically picks Method A/B/C based on drift tier from changepoint analysis, with top picks and conviction scores.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

How to Read

Score -7 to +7: win_rate x return_magnitude x stat_confidence x horizon_weight  | Dir: LONG if predicted 10d return > 0  | Hit%: % of analog days with positive fwd return  | Cell colours: per-column 5th-95th percentile gradient
Slope Stage Stg: 1=Basing 2=Uptrend 3=Parabolic 4=Decline | TQ: Trend Quality 0-100 | Slp%: Annualized slope
Momentum Ranker MRk: Rank (lower=better) | MSc: Composite score | MF: Flag | PB: Pullback
Pullback Health Hlth: Health score 0-100 | Vrd: Verdict | DD: Drawdown in NATR units | Rcv: Historical median recovery %
Actual Returns Predictions Momentum z-scores REGIME = regime bull ETF
Filters: Entry = Stage 2 + Long + Score>0 (best entry candidates)  |  Top 50 Mom = top 50 momentum ranker tickers  |  Healthy = pullback health >= 80 (HEALTHY verdict)  |  PB Warning = pullback health < 40 (deep pullback or deteriorating)
